zh.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: 英國威爾斯丹比爾特福 在 利格
zh.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig於1130年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾。他於1145年之後與Gwenllian ferch Owain在威爾士凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年在威爾士享年39歲。

zh-hans.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: 英国威尔斯丹比爾特福 在 利格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig于1130年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾。他于1145年之后与Gwenllian ferch Owain在威尔士凱爾納方史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年在威尔士享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Hwfa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig was born in 1130, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He married Gwenllian ferch Owain after 1145, in Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1169, in Wales, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig est né en 1130, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Owain après 1145, à Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1169, à Galles, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig wurde 1130 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat nach 1145 in Caernarfonshire, Wales Gwenllian ferch Owain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrigは1130年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた。1145年以後にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでGwenllian ferch Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年にウェールズで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig(은)는 1130년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1145년 이후 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Gwenllian ferch Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 웨일스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hwfa ap Cynwrig родился в 1130 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Owain после 1145 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1169 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 39 лет.
